title: strychnos angustiflora
intro: Strychnos angustiflora, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a stimulant and astringent. The health benefits of Strychnos angustiflora include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, although it should be used with caution due to its toxic nature. Herbal preparations of Strychnos angustiflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used in small amounts to avoid adverse effects.
